clauses.statement: Delivery policy preserves unspecified limits and unmeasured values as unknown, evaluates time, token, cost, subagent, role-dispatch, repair-batch, and verification budgets, and emits typed budget_exceeded or attribution_unknown stops.

test_refs.case: policy keeps unspecified and unmeasured budgets unknown instead of zero
budget exceed and required attribution unknown are typed stops

clauses.statement: Review dispatch records risk closure, expected judgment delta, reusable evidence and budget; final dispatch requires a frozen source, Spec, test and review surface, and the Story-stage-role-HEAD-surface binding is idempotent across running, uncollected and completed-pass states.

test_refs.case: final review waits for an exact frozen surface while preflight remains available
same binding dispatch is idempotent for running, uncollected, and completed pass lifecycles

clauses.statement: Running review work superseded by a HEAD mutation becomes obsolete only after confirmed cancellation or closure; unconfirmed cancellation emits an orphaned_agent stop.

test_refs.case: HEAD mutation terminalizes obsolete work and fails closed when cancellation is unconfirmed
review lifecycle fails closed on HEAD mutation and persists obsolete after explicit close

clauses.statement: Compatible repairable findings with one role and normalized code/test surface share one implementation dispatch, targeted verification and independent re-review; conflicts and human or split decisions remain separate.

test_refs.case: compatible repairable findings batch by role and surface while human/conflicting findings remain separate
TDEG-S-5 compatible repairable findings share one dispatch, verification, and re-review batch

clauses.statement: Story metrics separate Trusted PR-ready elapsed, observed work, tool wait, union review wall-clock, summed agent consumption, subagent and role dispatch counts, repair and verification counters, evidence reuse or invalidation, fresh and total tokens and cost; missing values remain unknown.

test_refs.case: metrics separate review union wall clock from parallel agent consumption and preserve unknown
SRP-S-6 summary reports per-Story time cost suite reuse and interruptions without converting unknown to zero
portfolio aggregates overlapping review intervals before persisting closed attribution

clauses.statement: PR correctness readiness remains independent from visible timeout, obsolete, orphan, duplicate-dispatch and budget efficiency debt; required tests, independent review, critical Gates, current-HEAD binding and fail-closed semantics are never relaxed for efficiency.

test_refs.case: efficiency debt stays separate from correctness readiness
pr gate summary exposes review lifecycle debt without changing correctness readiness
pr summary exposes delivery budget, attribution, dispatch, repair, and debt without changing correctness readiness
